summary: Iter-18 (Phases 1+2+3) full backend & frontend smoke testing. Backend pytest suite (19 tests) → 100% PASS. Frontend Stock page, LeadForm simplification, and ShowAdvanced toggle visually verified. All 12 listed test cases pass at the API level; UI key elements rendered correctly.
action_items: Optional cleanup: 2 leftover booked TEST chassis (TESTBKBAC74C54, TESTBKACCB6120) remain in inventory because they are 'booked'. They will surface as test residue on the /stock page until the corresponding TEST_Iter18 leads' bookings are cancelled. Consider adding a teardown that cancels bookings then deletes inventory, or a super-admin force-delete endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~4848 lines — recommend splitting into modules (auth, leads, bookings, inventory, masters, whatsapp, campaigns) per code review guideline (>700 lines). Hot reload still fine but maintainability suffers.

POST /api/inventory and DELETE /api/inventory/{id} use get_current_user + an inline role check instead of require_roles('admin','super_admin'). Functionally fine, but inconsistent with rest of codebase (use Depends(require_roles(...)) for clarity & RBAC test coverage).

STAGES list contains 9 entries but stage_order in /booking endpoint relies on positional index — if STAGES is reordered later, Booking Hold (index 4) vs Booking (index 3) is correct only because Booking comes before Booking Hold. The current order works (Token=Hold > Booking) but is fragile; consider explicit precedence map.

/leads/{lid}/stage validation block has a duplicated `if body.stage == 'Follow-up'` (line 1518 and 1525) — second one expects 'Follow-up' but its check (Connected+Interested) reads more like an Interest-stage gate. Now that Interest stage was removed via STAGE_ALIAS, this logic effectively double-runs on Follow-up and may surprise users.
performance() and branch-compare include legacy stage names (e.g., {'$in': ['Delivered','RTO','Delivered']}) — duplicate 'Delivered' string and missing 'Booking Hold' in pending counts.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical-path smoke (Stock page, LeadForm visibility, Show advanced toggle)

seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_Iter18 leads + TEST*-prefixed inventory chassis. Cleanup test removed all available items + leads; 2 booked chassis remain in DB (linked to deleted leads — orphaned-but-locked). DB is otherwise clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter18_simplification.py is the regression suite for iter-18 stages, inventory CRUD, CSV upload idempotency, exchange-photos PAN/RC buckets, and booking payment_type Token/Full + chassis lock. All 9 STAGES, /admin/migrate-stages (idempotent), and 'Walk-in' default source are validated. To re-run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://leads-date-tracking.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_iter18_simplification.py -v. 2 leftover booked TEST chassis remain — manual mongo cleanup if needed.
